Text.Main: What sort of item do you need?  I have salvaged armor, projectile weapons, and power plants -- all top quality, needing only minor repairs.
INC is proud to provide this vending terminal on a trial basis to the inhabitants of New Tocado.  Please choose the class of merchandise you would like to purchase.
